name: octo-oke-latency-percentiles
displayName: OCTO OKE — latency p50/p95/p99 during scale (checkout + java)
description: Latency distribution (p50/p95/p99) for the shop checkout path and the Java payment gateway, bucketed at 30s. Used during Phase 7 stress runs to show the latency hump pre-scale-out and the recovery after HPA adds pods. Bucket is intentionally tight (30s) to stay visually responsive within a 3–5 minute stress window.
queryString: service.namespace = 'octo_apm_demo' and (operationName = '/api/shop/checkout' or service.name = 'octo-apm-java-demo') | stats percentile(duration, 50) as p50, percentile(duration, 95) as p95, percentile(duration, 99) as p99 by service.name, bucket(30s) | sort +bucket

external_drilldowns.name: Langfuse / LLMetry
external_drilldowns.why: Drill into per-LLM call latency when checkout p95 spikes due to GenAI.

external_drilldowns.name: Grafana
external_drilldowns.why: Compare APM-side latency with cluster / RUM dashboards.
